form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Bairnsdale 0 - 62 March 22 over 1600m defeating Foggy Bottom carrying 58.5kg at $3.10. The run before that won by a long-neck at Colac 0 - 56 March 1 over 1600m in soft going defeating The Daily Planet with 59kg at $7.50. In form and is well in the mix.
